name: Ingenia Communities Group
analysis: INA has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 29% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$4.2800. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$4.3800, stop A$3.8511, target A$5.2152 (1.58:1) — then trail it.
